name: Ranger of the jungle
short_description: The elves in Jade Forest possess the Eternal Power, which was coveted by the King of demons who summoned the Demonic Circle and commanded Hellhounds, Fallen Angels and Orcs to invade the realm of elves.The elves were outnumbered and you must convene your former colleagues, lead the team, control the battle, guarantee the supplies, then...
detailed_description:
This is a difficult TD game.
Choose 3 heros and gain cooperative effects.
Unique Altar Pylon, the core of this game.
8 legendary heros with different skills, which can be unlocked by Achievement.
5 maps with different themes and defense tasks.
3 models in every level, your tactics will be challenged.
44 achievements, a challenging game.
